perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a hat and glasses makes a shushing gesture. He then stacks and unboxes four white iPhone boxes (Orange, Green, Silver, Gold). He taps on the boxes and peels off the protective films. (2) He showcases the back of the phones, focusing on the camera layouts. (3) The video transitions to a split-screen or montage showing the phones (Sage Green, Cosmic Orange, Silver, Champagne Gold) from different angles, comparing how they look in indoor versus outdoor lighting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) No loud vocals; instead, there is a series of ASMR sounds: rhythmic tapping on cardboard, the sound of plastic film peeling, and the clicking of phone buttons. A male voice is heard whispering 'Shhh' at the very beginning. (2) At 13 seconds, upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music begins. The ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a studio environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '沈浸式開箱' (Immersive Unboxing) at the bottom. (2) Decorative Text: Social media handles '3c有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' in the top left. (3) Functional Text: Labels for phone models such as 'iPhone 17 鼠尾草綠色' (Sage Green), 'iPhone Air 淺金色' (Light Gold), 'iPhone 17 Pro 銀色' (Silver), and 'iPhone 17 Pro Max 宇宙橙色' (Cosmic Orange). (4) Functional Text: '室外' (Outdoor) and '室內' (Indoor) labels to denote lighting conditions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Immersive Unboxing ASMR -> Visual Comparison Showcase

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the devices.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, a two-tone beige and tan flat cap, a black t-shirt featuring a rainbow-colored Apple logo, and a beaded bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor minimalist studio with a white wall and a wooden table. Later, an outdoor location with a textured gray stone/concrete wall.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and natural daylight.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between ASMR and BGM

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and compare the aesthetic designs and camera configurations of the rumored or mockup 'iPhone 17' series through an engaging ASMR unboxing experience followed by real-world lighting comparisons.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While Apple products are featured, the content appears to be an independent tech influencer showcase of mockups or leaks rather than a paid advertisement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's specific flat cap and the rainbow Apple logo shirt.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages high-production ASMR techniques to increase viewer retention during the unboxing phase.
